channel.title: GitHub Erlang Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Erlang in GitHub

item.title: emqx/emqx
item.description: An Open-Source, Cloud-Native, distributed MQTT Message Broker for Large-scale IoT Applications.

item.title: erlang/otp
item.description: Erlang/OTP

item.title: covertool/covertool
item.description: Tool to convert Erlang cover data files into Cobertura XML reports

item.title: HalloAppInc/ecredis
item.description: Erlang Cluster Redis Client

item.title: erlydtl/erlydtl
item.description: Django templates for Erlang

item.title: benoitc/hackney
item.description: simple HTTP client in Erlang

item.title: benoitc/mimerl
item.description: library to handle mimetypes

item.title: mochi/mochiweb
item.description: MochiWeb is an Erlang library for building lightweight HTTP servers.

item.title: eproxus/meck
item.description: A mocking library for Erlang

item.title: erlang/rebar3
item.description: Erlang build tool that makes it easy to compile and test Erlang applications and releases.

item.title: lpgauth/swirl
item.description: High-Performance Erlang Stream Processor

item.title: seth/ej
item.description: Helper module for working with Erlang terms representing JSON

item.title: lpgauth/shackle
item.description: High-Performance Erlang Network Client Framework

item.title: chef/chef-server
item.description: Chef Infra Server is a hub for configuration data; storing cookbooks, node policies and metadata of managed nodes.

item.title: devinus/poolboy
item.description: A hunky Erlang worker pool factory

item.title: openx/ox-thrift
item.description: Erlang Thrift encoder/decoder library optimized for efficiency

item.title: dmitryme/erlang_localtime
item.description: Erlang library for conversion from one local time to another

item.title: alavrik/piqi-erlang
item.description: Protocol Buffers, JSON, XML data serialization system for Erlang

item.title: erlware/erlcron
item.description: Erlang cronish system

item.title: choptastic/qdate
item.description: Erlang date, time, and timezone management: formatting, conversion, and date arithmetic

item.title: erlcloud/eini
item.description: An Erlang INI parser

item.title: uwiger/edown
item.description: EDoc extension for generating Github-flavored Markdown

item.title: for-GET/jesse
item.description: jesse (JSon Schema Erlang) is an implementation of a JSON Schema validator for Erlang.

item.title: goj/base16
item.description: The last time I hexadecimify Erlang binaries...

item.title: processone/ejabberd
item.description: Robust, Ubiquitous and Massively Scalable Messaging Platform (XMPP, MQTT, SIP Server)
